title: White Plastic & Paper Flea Detection Kit for Pets - Easy-to-Use, Essential Tool for Identifying Flea Infestation
features: COMPLETE DETECTION SOLUTION: This kit includes everything you need to confirm the presence of fleas on your pets, 3 fine plastic combs for thorough combing, 4 test papers to spot fleas easily, and a comprehensive guide to walk you through each step.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS: Crafted from durable plastic, the combs in our kit are designed to withstand regular use, while the test papers are carefully selected for their ability to clearly reveal flea infestations.

EFFORTLESS TO USE: Our user-friendly detection kit makes it simpler than ever to check your pets for fleas. Follow our comprehensive guide to meticulously comb through your pets coat and use the test papers to reveal any signs of fleas.

PERFECT FOR ALL PETS: Whether you have a dog, cat, rabbit, or any furry friend, our flea detection kit is versatile enough to be used effectively. Its gentle combs and easy-to-read test papers make it suitable for pets of all sizes and fur lengths.

ESSENTIAL TOOL FOR PET HEALTH: Early detection of fleas is crucial for the health and comfort of your furry friends. Our flea detection kit is an essential tool for any pet owner, helping you to take prompt action against flea infestations.
description: Product Description This flea detection kit quickly detects existing fleas. Safety Warning No warning applicable
